# Architecture

## Frontend SPA and API served from the same origin — no CORS or proxy

When adding new frontend API calls or routes, the `@fastify/static` plugin serves `public/` at the same origin as `/api/*` on port 3827. There is no separate dev server or webpack-dev-server. All `fetch()` calls in `public/modules/api.js` use relative paths. If you split frontend and backend to different ports for hot-reload, Fastify has no CORS headers configured.
Consequence: adding a separate frontend dev server without CORS configuration on the Fastify side will block all API calls with 'blocked by CORS policy' errors.

_Source: `src/server.js`_

_Tags: `frontend`, `backend`, `api`_
